Meaning.Vi: Cúi gập, uốn cong (cơ thể hoặc vật cứng)
Meaning.En: To bend or move (a part of the body, especially a joint) in order to reduce the angle between two parts.
Meaning.Example: She flexed her elbow to show off her biceps.

Situation.Vi: Người tập thể hình uốn cong khuỷu tay để căng cơ.
Situation.En: A bodybuilder bends their elbow to contract and display their biceps.

Meaning.Vi: Khoe khoang, phô trương (khả năng, sức mạnh, tài sản)
Meaning.En: To display something in a way that is intended to impress or provoke admiration or envy.
Meaning.Example: He flexed his wealth by driving an expensive sports car to the party.

Situation.Vi: Người nổi tiếng đăng ảnh xe sang để khoe thành công.
Situation.En: A celebrity posts photos of luxury cars to showcase their success.

Meaning.Vi: Sự uốn cong, sự co cơ
Meaning.En: The action of bending or contracting a muscle or joint.
Meaning.Example: He did a few flexes to warm up before lifting weights.

Situation.Vi: Vận động viên thực hiện động tác co cơ để kiểm tra sức mạnh.
Situation.En: An athlete performs muscle contractions to assess strength and readiness.
